block.vital_herbs.land_mine_block.descri: If any entity touches it, it will explode without destroying nearby blocks. Can be placed on a wall. or ceiling.
item.vital_herbs.aegis_grove.description: §8A durable defensive axe with extended reach. §bShift+Right-click for a protective blast that repels and damages nearby foes. §6Regular attacks have stronger knockback. §9Attacking 6 times grants Resistance I for 7.5 seconds.§r
item.vital_herbs.bleeding_heart_cream.de: §8Grant you §2Resilience effect §8when you drink. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.cleansing_concoction.de: §8Drink this to cleanse your body of §2all negative effects §8and §2restore the integrity of your gear§8. But beware, complete purity can sometimes leave you vulnerable. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
§aRepair Item in left hand and armor
item.vital_herbs.crimsonfetish_tea.descr: §8Grant you §2Crimson Fetish effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.fizz_fruity_cream.descr: §8Grant you §2Haste effect §8when you drink. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.frost_mint_tea.descript: §8Grant you §2Fire Resistance effect §8when you drink. But it may make you frozen. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.glow_leaf_tea.descripti: §8Grant you §2Night Vision effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.grim_chew.description_0: §8Grant you §2Strength and furious effect §8when you consume. Can be used perfectly in hurry time. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.grim_poisonous_tea.desc: §8Grant you §2Strength and Furious effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.heart_gummy.description: Eat to heal 10% of your max health. Perfectly use in hurry time.
item.vital_herbs.honey_salve.description: Eat to clear negative effect and heal 5% of your max health. Perfectly use in hurry time.
item.vital_herbs.indigo_spar_cream.descr: §8Grant you §2Water Breathing effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.insight_concoction.desc: §8Unlock your §2inner vision §8and gain incredible §2speed in tasks§8. But sometimes, seeing too much can be overwhelming. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.iron_root_cream.descrip: §8Grant you §2Resistance and Anchored Feet effect §8when you drink. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.mourning_chew.descripti: §8Grant you §2Absorbtion and Anti Wither effect §8when you consume. Can be used perfectly in hurry time. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.mourning_tea.descriptio: §8Grant you §2Absorbtion and Anti Wither effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.pepper_snap_tea.descrip: §8Grant you §2Speed effect §8when you drink. But have a chance to make you lit on fire. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.precision_bloom.descrip: §8A tool of §bprecision and swiftness§8, capable of §9sensing nearby entities with Shift+Right-click§8 and §ailluminating the darkest depths with radiant blooms.§r
item.vital_herbs.purifying_oil.descripti: §7A refined oil, imbued with cleansing properties. Essential for restoring the integrity of your tools and weapons on the §aGreen Slate Pedestal§7.
item.vital_herbs.razor_leaf_axe.descript: When hit an enemy with this, enemy will bleed and cause them to hurt.
item.vital_herbs.razor_leaf_pickaxe.desc: When hit an enemy with this, enemy will bleed and cause them to hurt.
item.vital_herbs.razor_leaf_sword.descri: When hit an enemy with this, enemy will bleed and cause them to hurt.
item.vital_herbs.shielding_concoction.de: §8Gain immediate §2toughness §8and §2resistance §8to damage. But even the strongest shield has its limits. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
§8Grant you §2Regeneration effect and cure all effect §8when you drink. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.spicy_chew.description_: §8Grant you §2Speed effect §8when you consume. Can be used perfectly in hurry time. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.strenght_concoction.des: §8Feel an immediate boost of §2raw power §8and §2swiftness§8. But be careful not to push yourself too hard. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.thorn_heart_tea.descrip: §8Grant you §2Thorn Skin effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.tough_chew.description_: §8Grant you §2Resistance and Anchored Feet effect §8when you consume. Can be used perfectly in hurry time. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.tox_kiss_cream.descript: §8Grant you §2Anti Poison effect §8when you drink. But it may has some side effect. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.verdant_scourge.descrip: §8Pulsates with §6untamed power§8. Grants its wielder §bextreme speed, force, and extended reach§8 for swift, devastating assaults. It carries a §aminor bleed chance.§r
item.vital_herbs.vital_concoction.descri: §8Grants an immediate surge of §2vitality §8and powerful §2regeneration§8. But it also temporarily overloads your body. §cThe effect's duration is stackable.
item.vital_herbs.vital_pills.description: Eat to clear negative effect and heal 15% of your max health. Perfectly use in hurry time.
jei.vital_herbs.herb_bath_jei_informatio: Place it on a heat source block, then insert any 2 recipes (recipes are shown in JEI) and add a water bucket. If the recipe is correct, the arrow will appear. When finished, it will show the effect you will receive. Step into the bath to gain the effect.
jei.vital_herbs.incense_jei_information: Place any herb in one slot and a flint and steel in another slot to light the incense and spread its effect to the nearby area.
jei.vital_herbs.pedestal_jei_information: Place any item on the pedestal to display an orb. Activate the pedestal using a §3Aura Crystal§r. Then, use specific items to perform the ritual (recipes are shown in JEI). Some recipes have multiple steps: if the orb turns §5Purple§r, it means the ritual is on the correct step; if it turns §6Yellow§r, the recipe is complete.
